PluginData.Author: maxpowa
PluginData.Tooltip: Mirror grids along an axis and paste from clipboard
PluginData.Description:
Mirrors a grid along the X, Y, or Z axis and copies the result to your clipboard for pasting.
Usage: /mirror [X|Y|Z] — Mirror the grid you are looking at. /mirror help — Show help in chat.
Requires creative mode or creative tools enabled.
